Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2024
Event Date: 12/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: T27


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Rammer Chest
Fearsome Plush Bear Totem

Once in a while, when the unit's health drops below 35%, they restore 25% health and gain a shield that absorbs 50% damage. The shield lasts for 4 sec. Also, the unit can't be affected by movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, or fear for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90
